title: 雾中灯塔
visual_style: 水墨淡彩电影感，低饱和度青灰色调，东方意境，薄雾氛围
narration: 清晨的薄雾笼罩着旧码头，一只纸船缓缓驶出，驶向远方灯塔的微光。
music_prompt: Ambient piano with soft reverb, gentle waves, distant wind chimes, minimal and meditative, lo-fi acoustic atmosphere

scenes.name: 码头晨雾
scenes.image_prompt: Old wooden pier in early morning mist, weathered wood texture, foggy atmosphere, soft diffused light, cinematic composition, Chinese ink painting style, muted teal and grey tones, seagulls in distance
scenes.video_prompt: Slow pan across misty pier, fog slowly rolling in, subtle light rays breaking through, gentle camera movement, 6 seconds duration, tranquil mood

scenes.name: 纸船起航
scenes.image_prompt: Origami paper boat floating on calm water surface, delicate craftsmanship, morning dew on paper, reflections on water, soft focus background, ethereal lighting, minimalist composition
scenes.video_prompt: Paper boat gently drifting forward, tiny wake ripples on water, camera slowly tracking the boat, soft bobbing motion, 6 seconds duration, dreamlike movement

scenes.name: 灯塔指引
scenes.image_prompt: Distant lighthouse emerging from morning fog, warm golden light at top, paper boat small in foreground composition, vast misty seascape, emotional scale contrast, cinematic wide shot
scenes.video_prompt: Paper boat moving toward lighthouse beam of light, lighthouse light slowly rotating, fog dissipating slightly, zoom out reveal, 6 seconds duration, hopeful atmosphere
